node.text: Agle Janam aau mammi to pyar de Dena bs 😢
@htttppp_exist nahi bhai agle janam aau mammi to samosa de Dena bas 😢
@yahiya_7777 agar adopt hi krna tha unhe to fir tu hi q😭😂
Be Strong 💪 Koi na bada hoke unhein vridhhasharm bhej dena.
Bhagwan ye din kisi ko na dikhaee kabhi 🤧🥺
@siyasoni2006 hota h didi 💔 ab aapko bdla Lena hoga unsb se jisne aapko  rulaya h 🥀🥀❤️❤️
@siyasoni2006  Are meri bahen Tu aaja mai khilaunga 💔
@priya_thakur_hu aap smjh nhi rhi..jo paraya h use bss ehsaas dilaya ja rha h
I was eating my food 🤢 look at that nosy face
@1.vision___ to bhaiya ji skip kr diya kro
@siyasoni2006 skip toh kaar dunga lekin jo dekha usko kaise aan-dekha kardu ? Atleast nakh toh poch leti behen
Koi boyfriend banega😍😍 I love you too❤️❤️❤️
💔or ☕ ka bartan bhii dhone ke liye rkha thaa 💔
"Villains are not born they are made" ☹️
And they say breakup hurts most🥀
Ye dekh mera mood kyu ban raha hai😂😂😂😂
Aajkal to tarbooz k chilke milte hn 😢
चटनी बेवफा थी इसलिए फेक दी गई 😢
Jaldi se chatni kha lo,nahi agle din woh bhi ni milegi
Itna kyu roo rahi ho aur lee aao
